message:
chore(gitignore): ignore local bead history snapshots and transient perf/session files

This commit extends repository ignore rules for local-only artifacts that repeatedly show up during agent-driven test/triage sessions but should not be versioned.

Added ignore patterns:
- `**/.beads/.br_history/issues.*.jsonl` to suppress local beads history snapshots generated by workflow tooling.
- `/session_report.md` to suppress ad hoc local session notes.
- `/perf.*.data` to catch additional perf artifact naming forms not covered by existing `perf_*.data*` patterns.

The intent is to reduce status noise and prevent accidental inclusion of environment-specific byproducts while preserving tracked project sources and reproducible artifacts intended for version control.

files.patch:
@@ -55,6 +55,7 @@ criterion/
 # Local perf/profiling artifacts (keep local)
 /perf.data*
 /perf_*.data*
+/perf.*.data
 /callgrind.out.*
 /flamegraph*.svg
 
@@ -80,6 +81,7 @@ storage.sqlite3-*
 **/.beads/.bv.lock
 **/.beads/.migration-hint-ts
 **/.beads/*.bak_*
+**/.beads/.br_history/issues.*.jsonl
 
 # bd obligation patches
 .bd-*.patch
@@ -93,6 +95,7 @@ test_meminfo
 SESSION_TODO.md
 SESSION_REPORT.md
 SESSION_*.md
+/session_report.md
 verify_*.sh
 newfile.txt
 repro_*.rs
